task_description: Upgrade all dependencies across the wiresentry project to their latest stable versions. This covers the C# Mono solution (target framework and tooling versions) and the Ruby on Rails web app (gem versions in Gemfile and Gemfile.lock).

verification.summary: Build and test commands cannot run under INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode. All .csproj files validated as well-formed XML with correct version values. Gemfile passes Ruby syntax check. Gemfile.lock DEPENDENCIES section is consistent with Gemfile. 6 files changed across both sub-projects.
